site.title: Hitwicket Analytics — Stakeholder Reports
site.description: Interactive analysis reads for Hitwicket Superstars stakeholders.

reports.title: Rep Point Gain & Loss — A/B Initial Read
reports.thesis: Hold at 10% Experiment — pinch is live, but overall monetisation is slightly soft and engagement dips a bit. Too early to expand; re-read in 1–2 weeks.
reports.description: Initial Jul 10–14 read of Rep Point Gain & Loss AB (Control Base vs Experiment). Treatment hygiene clean; overall ARPU slightly down; Remarkable monetisation up with more engagement soft.

reports.title: Rank-Based MM — Masterful+ Simulation
reports.thesis: Ship Masterful+ rank MM with whale timer; add cold-start/top-10 assists — biggest lift for non-whales and off-peak hours.
reports.description: Extensive sim of proposed Masterful+ matchmaking: evening deep-dive + full-day hourly concentration, v1 vs v2.

reports.title: Increased Wicket Chance — Jul 7–13 Redeploy Read
reports.thesis: Over Jul 7–13, Exp=2 holds median wickets at 2→3 with +22–30% mean lift and neutral same-day continuation. Scale Exp to 50% before relying on next-day retention.
reports.description: Jul 7–13 redeploy AB read — median 2→3 confirmed over a week; next-day retention underpowered at ~20% Exp.

reports.title: Whale MM — Win Streak Reversion A/B Phase 2 (Initial)
reports.thesis: Initial Jul 7–9 read only — too early to call. Mechanic works; engagement flat; monetisation slightly soft in Test. Extend window before deciding.
reports.description: Whale MM Phase 2 initial AB read (3-win Base vs 2-win Test). Directional only — no ship/rollback call on a 3-day window.

reports.title: PvP Matchmaking — Phase 2 Player & Session
reports.thesis: Median rolling close ~56% is healthy — blowout tail (~14%) is positive-blowout streaks in high-freq and 75k+ power, not stompings; session frustration rare.
reports.description: Phase 2 player rolling-25 + extensions — unsigned blowout cluster driven by positive blowout; negative blowout cluster vanishingly rare; retention parked.

reports.title: Whale MM — Win Streak Reversion A/B
reports.thesis: MDAU essentially flat (gap narrowing); D3 whale ARPU7 ahead in Test (+₹599). Continue Test case. May 15 – Jun 21 read preserved in dashboard.
reports.description: Whale MM win-streak reversion AB — Jun 15–29 extended read. MDAU essentially flat; D3 whale ARPU7 ahead in Test.

reports.title: PvP Matchmaking — Phase 1 Baseline
reports.thesis: Quality is healthy on average, but high-frequency and top-end players see ~10pp fewer close matches — monitor before changing MM windows.
reports.description: PvP matchmaking Phase 1 baseline — 55% close matches on average; high-frequency and top-end players underserved.

reports.title: Increased Wicket Chance — A/B Test (Clean Read)
reports.thesis: The current wicket-chance increase is too small to change how players play or to shift match balance.
reports.description: Wicket Chance AB clean read — increase too small to change how players play; median wickets unchanged at 2.
